blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 34 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 50°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 26".
